★★★★★ Johnlund55 · Apr 2024
✨ Mentions you👨‍👩‍👧 Family SUV🧘 No-Pressure
Everyone was friendly, knowledgeable, and not pushy. The dealership did everything they had promised ahead of delivery. And Bill spent plenty of time explaining all of the features, of which there are many these days. This whole transaction unfolded from a “hidden” warranty that their phone rep made me aware of for an issue on my nearly 10 year old Sonata. So, one comment on the phone by an employee leads to a car sale. This is our second Hyundai from this dealer and we will be back.

I have been a customer of Winnipeg Hyundai since 2002. Their sales and service is solid. Questions are answered up front and no hidden surprises. I have been to other Hyundai dealerships and other competitor dealerships. I always come back to Winnipeg Hyundai for their sale and service.

★★★★★ Corrie C · Sep 2019
💳 Credit Story
The staff at Winnipeg Hyundai makes buying a car a great experience. Making such a large financial purchase can be very overwhelming and downright scary but the staff at Winnipeg Hyundai answer all your questions and make you feel like you're getting all the details you need to make a wise and informed decision. They really work to make sure that you're purchasing the right car for your needs and your budget. They're not in it for the commission, they are there to support their customers.
